title: senecio neriifolius
intro: Senecio neriifolius, also known as Black-leaved Jacob's Ladder, is a perennial herb native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Senecio neriifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be infused in hot water or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
